review_title: First tool to use if you're creating a mobile app
description: Great app to do qualitative analytics in user's natural environment helping faster product development. This enables better prioritisation decisions.
author: Sagar M.
pros: Ability to view each session and understand UX issues without having to wait for user feedback
cons: Inability to create custom tags for users for easier identification in case where we want to view the recordings anonymously.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A tool you didnt know you needed
description: great, couldnt expect more. grat integrations available as well
author: Tarnika C.
pros: easeof use, amazing UI, very cost efficient tool
cons: the dasboard metrics are not entirely customizable

review_title: Encountered issues often
description: Found some issues in our application that our visitors were facing.
author: Faheem S.
pros: The idea is good to view your customer actions in a live way. The platform is easy to deploy without changing your code.
cons: Will pay more than you get. Data will disappear any day, Application filters don't work. Check alternatives as well.

review_title: I was able to update my website without requesting criticism, which saved me a lot of time.
description: I watch a few records at random and can tell what the user wants from our website.
author: Atour T.
pros: The basis of Smartlook's conversion rate optimization mechanism is qualitative data. It enables me to gather, record, observe, and analyze visitor behavior on our website.Owners of interactive websites that want to employ qualitative analytics to enhance the performance of their platform can use Smartlook. Numerous third-party applications, including Wordpress, Google Analytics, and Shopify, are integrated by Smartlook. It includes a mobile app, is accessible for free, and offers premium customers access to additional tools and functions, which is really helpful to me.
cons: I want to have the choice of viewing the recordings in a pop-up window or a panel on the same screen.I don't have the possibility to organize the recordings into folders or tag them.

review_title: Good option to analyse your customer behavior
description: We used this tool for 2 years, it was very useful for use to record our customers interactions.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: -Heatmaps. - Bugs tracker. - Funnel optimization
cons: - The price is higher compared with similar tools

review_title: Excellent for improving the user experience.
author: Ray R.
pros: The features it provides, particularly when beginning off as a free customer. The user interface is straightforward, with automatic recording of critical events that may be used to create a pipeline, a fast advance option, and emphasized portions that can be reviewed, among other features.
cons: We do not use the Heatmap capability, and therefore feel it may be improved. We use a different service for it.

review_title: Great for UX optimisation
description: We are generally loving so far the functionalities it offers to our team to be able to understand the digital behaviour of our users with our beta tool
author: Chryso S.
pros: The functionalities it offers, especially when starting as a freemium user. The UX is simple, automatically tracking important events that can be used to set up a funnel, the fast forward option and the highlighted elements you can review, etc.
cons: We are not using the Heatmap functionality, and we believe there can be an improvement on that feature. We are using a separate provider for that.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: DX Heroes review
description: Smartlook has a clean UI and it's easy to set up. I wouldn't say I like the blocking page after the trial ended because I wanted to show SmartLook to my colleague first before we decide if it has enough value for our business.
author: Prokop S.
pros: It's better than HotJar and I want to support Czech startups instead of foreign startups. :) The UI is much better than in HotJar.
cons: I am still not sure if the first plan has suitable value for the money. I really appreciate the extended trial period.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Smartlooked for awhile now
description: Smartlook has given time management a new definition. It allows us to save tremendous time and work more efficiently.
author: Cynthia R.
pros: So we've been using Smartlook for some time now and I always thought it was a decent program. Having just gone through an entire tax season with almost every call utilizing this tool, it deserves a second view so to speak. Smartlook allows tech support or agents (in my company) to share screens with their customers. We can see their mouse movements, help them to navigate through the various options and features and troubleshoot errors by literally putting our eyes on it. It works by having the customer provide a code given on the website and this code allows access to their screen through Smartlook. Agents and customers alike have come to rely heavily on Smartlook to help get the support they need and get it in a timely manner. It makes a world of difference when you can see the screen, identify the issue and solve it all at once rather than take precious minutes and hours trying to describe what is going on and another hour trying to describe how to fix it.
cons: The only thing I can say I least like about this software is that you can only screenshare within the website. Unlike another competition, you cannot screen the customers complete computer screen. If a customer wants to minimize a screen so you can see a document on their computer, for instance, you can't. In my line of work its not a deal breaker at all because the majority of the workflow is within the website.

review_title: I hope our competitors won't discover this tool before we take the advantage!
description: We decreased our churn rates by 20% in tutorial sequence. I believe this product can increase many of the mobile game's retention by 5% to 10% easily. I am writing this comment because developers are friendly, and they deserve success. However, I still hope my competitors don't discover this tool.
author: Melih Ç.
pros: We love all the data and funnels but when it comes to looking at what players are doing in the game is something different. We can now watch what players are doing. This is magical! With Smartlook we can now learn what they like how they interact with the game, and we can design the game accordingly.
cons: I think the monetization of the product is still premature however price is still great for this quality product. I believe if the product encourages companies to use it for every app & game they have, this product can increase it's revenue more than limiting funnel and events. Smartlook is a secret weapon for any mobile game studio, and if this product wants to tap into that market, its monetization needs to be adjusted. I hope our competitors will not discover this product before we take full advantage!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Smartlook user
author: Kajetan M.
pros: I appreciate the simplicity and ease of working with the tool. It is very easy to teach even a potential client how to use the smarlook in the future and learn from it
cons: I miss setting a session limit for a given project and events for incorrect input filling.

review_title: Best For Website Tracking
description: Overall I am good to use smart look I am rating is 9 out of 10 on capterra.
author: Moh A.
pros: Smartlook help me to increase my website traffic by around 15-20% each month. Why? It is a very good tool to find and view real-time visitors what they are doing on your website and where they are dropping off so that you can fix the point. Also, smart look is very efficient to create a funnel and segregate traffic by the type of device, country,etc
cons: There is one problem I have faced while using smart look, sometimes i see for real-time visitors it shows a little late like around 5min late.

review_title: Want to Increase your Website productivity? - If Yes then 1000% Smartlook Help You :)
description: - User Insights in terms of Interest, Thoughts and Where to convert - Remove unwanted things by adding user interest things.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: First of all, I like the way to install and configure - Very Easy Step by Using GTM or Code. Just A Single Code and Get it Done. Second is Each and Every Second, Review, Insights Interest Showcase in Video Format. Heatmaps is also a great feature. I am new for now - reviewing in just after 10 min of signup at Smartlook - but I feel I should share my experience as a new user and ofcourse i am exploring it more and will look into it details. And Yes - It helps me to give a clear understanding about what user looking, searching and react more. So I can get my platform more better in terms of design and options.
cons: For Now - I am a newbee here. But Ofcourse if there I finf something issue or something i dislike - then i will share to support to make it easier or fruitful for users.
author_profession: Digital Marketing Executive - Social Media , Marketing Strategist
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: giving good experience to our online customers
author: Thileepan K.
pros: Smartlook really help for our online business, we can find perfect analysis for our website with SmartLook, when we use SmartLook, we discover our website traffic source and bugs so we can give best experience to our online customers.
cons: SmartLook have many features, we offer many product with our website so we need discover each product, sales, traffic, bugs, but SmartLook made easy to work with product analysis. we analysis about each product, so we update and give best to our customers.

review_title: Brilliant software by Smartlook and a real game changer its like looking over the customer shoulder
description: It is so easy to use and is like watching a video of someone using your website. I have no idea how they get such fantastic video quality (or seem video quality) and not slow down the website. This is fantastic software and a real game changer, I have already started spotting little tweaks that need implementing from watching over the customer's shoulder.
author: John W.
pros: A fast easy implementation does not slow down the website, you can see what the customer gets up to. You will not believe the quality and once you have tried it no more need to study analytics charts to try and figure out what is going on. You won't believe it but it is FREE.

review_title: It is the best tool ever
author: Cristian G.
pros: There are a tons of tools to track visitors, but watch what they are really doing is amazing. Those insights can change everything and help you to create the best customer experience.
cons: nothing!! everything is cool. Maybe it would be great if you can gather together all sesion that are similar, so you don't have to spend time looking similar sesion that doesn't help you.

review_title: The Best
description: increase your own visitors per pages
author: Quang Tri N.
pros: I love the Heatmaps section, especially to view DESKTOP and SMARTPHONE maps. I advice to use this software to understand the section of your website useless.
cons: Enlarge total storage limit for free account at all websites. It is better araound 1,000 per website.

review_title: Solid tool with good insights
description: Really good tool to use that gives good insights - does what it does well
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Great session recordings feature- allows for segmentation and rage clicks. In addition it allows UID to be passed to the Smartlook app and gives total number of events and pages. VERY good segmentation and ability to isolate recordings and share recordings. Easy to set up funnel tracking with custom events/URL's etc - good visualisation and linking to falloff recordings etc.
cons: Really missing AB test and Form Analysis functionality. Will be a great tool when that is added. Heatmaps also does not show % clicks on map, so missing some crucial analytical data
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Essential Online Marketing and Customer Experience tool.
author: Enver A.
pros: It is a great tool to monitor incoming traffic (with sources), and to track their movements on the website in order to improve the user experience on the website. It is a great feedback tool.

review_title: An amazing tecnology!
description: Because it can be free and help people about their website usage.

pros: That I can see what customers are viewing and clicking when using my website. It´s perfect to see even if your website is loading faster for the user and what appears in the first byte.
cons: Sometimes videos are short but I think it´s because the user got off the website. I can´t figure out anything else.

review_title: Good tool to check real-time visitors

cons: It would be nice if there will be some opportunity to download done heatmaps

review_title: Undoubtedly it is the best option for analysis of behavior in websites.
description: They allowed me to see how people use my sites and make improvements for a fair price and a friendly tool.
author: Marlon A.
pros: Simple and efficient tools, they deliver what they promise. The administrative panel is easy and intuitive allowing you to quickly access your clients' accounts. The price is the best and the free account is excellent with few limitations. Would certainly recommend!
cons: Maybe they could include feedback resources like polls and surveys. Also have a tool for receiving visual feedback, allowing visitors to select areas or elements of the site / app and write comments.
